meta.title: Air Force Basic Training - Prepare for Combat - Week 4
meta.description:
Week 4 of Air Force Basic Training is usually seen as the preparation week for BEAST week. This week, a lot of work is done on preparing for different threats which include chemical, biological, radiological, seaborne and nuclear. 
FEST classes also take place and combat techniques with their training weapon are also practised. Get training advice from former Drill Instructors and recruits delivered to your Sandboxx app every week. 

Are you or a loved one about to become the future of the Air Force?
Stay connected at every step of the Air Force journey as well as getting that training advice every week with the Sandboxx app: https://link.sandboxx.us/youtube
